comment: House style for ALL Bolt Club panel images. Each mission manifest merges these defaults with its own panels[]. Override any key (e.g. imageSize) per mission if needed.
styleSuffix: Black and white only. Visual style: detailed children's graphic-novel / manga-influenced ink illustration — rich background, clear expressions, dynamic poses, environmental props (signs, gear, architecture) like a premium chapter-book comic page. High contrast, clean outlines, no color. No speech bubbles. Do not include readable story paragraphs or fake handwriting in the image; tiny decorative English words on props or venue signs only if naturally part of the scene.
